name: PYXUS INTERNATIONAL, INC.
business: Pyxus International, Inc. is a global agricultural company that delivers value-added products and services, principally leaf tobacco. It purchases, processes, and sells leaf tobacco to manufacturers of tobacco products. The company also sells non-tobacco agricultural products, which represent less than 1% of consolidated revenues.
sellsTo: global customers in Africa, Asia, Europe, and Other regions

exposures.sentence: In connection with our leaf tobacco operations, the Company leverages its proprietary 'track-and-trace' platform, branded as SENTRI, to provide transparency into the lifecycle of agricultural products.
Our joint venture manufactures and supplies e-liquid and consumable nicotine-related products

catalysts.event: Capital investment for fiscal 2027 including new warehouse construction in South America and refurbishments in Africa
catalysts.sentence: We are anticipating $38.4 million in capital investments for fiscal 2027, which includes the new construction of a warehouse in South America and significant refurbishments to an existing warehouse in Africa.
